query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph showing part of a human ear and the side of a head, with a narrow vertical band of lighter tone along the left edge of the frame suggesting a door frame or wall edge. The person has light-colored hair visible at the lower right. The background contains deep blue tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, abstract close-up of a human ear and the side of a head, rendered with motion blur and soft focus that dissolves all fine detail into smeared shapes. The image is dominated by a sickly blue-green cast and muted, faded tones with extremely low contrast that crushes most tonal separation into a suffocating oppressive atmosphere. Deep shadows swallow much of the frame while highlights are blown or smeared. The composition has an accidental snapshot energy with unconventional framing that cuts awkwardly across the subject, the left edge interrupted by an indistinct vertical band. The overall effect is abstract and disorienting, the human form reduced to blurred color masses.
